title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: Work related injury after being struck in the head and neck by a three foot piece of pipe. Positive loss of consciousness was reported.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 05/18/2021. Work related injury after being struck in the head and neck by a three foot piece of pipe on 02/02/2019.

title: C2 fracture imaging result
description: Historical imaging summary documented a nondisplaced C2 fracture from the original work injury.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 08/22/2021. C2 nondisplaced fracture was described as part of the 02/02/2019 injury.

title: CTA neck showed vascular injury concern
description: Historical CTA neck summary documented vertebral artery abnormality from the original injury.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 08/23/2021. CTA neck and CT angiogram described vertebral artery abnormality from the 02/02/2019 work injury.

title: Imaging showed nondisplaced left scapular fracture
description: Historical fracture finding documented after the original work injury.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 11/29/2021. Left scapular nondisplaced fracture was documented as part of the 02/02/2019 injury history.

title: CT head showed no acute intracranial injury
description: Historical CT head summary documented left scalp and periorbital injury findings.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 12/15/2021. CT head and historical imaging summary referenced the 02/02/2019 work related injury.

title: Neurology follow-up for postconcussive syndrome
description: Follow-up after the 02/02/2019 injury with headaches and memory symptoms.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 01/31/2022. Neurology follow-up for postconcussive syndrome. The old 02/02/2019 injury date is discussed only as history.

title: Telephone follow-up for persistent migraines
description: Telephone follow-up after the 02/02/2019 injury for persistent migraines and postconcussive symptoms.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 03/08/2022. Telephone follow-up for persistent migraines and postconcussive syndrome. The 02/02/2019 injury date appears only as prior history.
